EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} printed the document "{object.name}" on the printer "{datafield1}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} printed a document on a printer with GUID {datafield2}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} printed the document on the printer "{datafield1}"
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} printed the document "{object.name}" on a printer with GUID {datafield2}
